absolute_path_to_the_repository_on_the_t: Absolute path to the repository on the target machine.
base_branch_for_the_pr_cloud_mode: Base branch for the PR (cloud mode)
describe_what_the_coding_agent_should_do: Describe what the coding agent should do...
e_g_main_defaults_to_the_repository_defa: e.g., main (defaults to the repository default branch)
edits_files_on_your_own_machine_over_ssh: Edits files on your own machine over SSH
generated_from_the_run_when_blank: Generated from the run when blank
number_of_messages_for_sliding_window: Number of messages for sliding window
open_the_pr_as_a_draft_cloud_mode: Open the PR as a draft (cloud mode)
personal_access_token_with_repo_scope_us: Personal access token with repo scope, used to clone, push, and open the PR.
public_hostname_from_a_tcp_tunnel_e_g: Public hostname from a TCP tunnel (e.g., 2.tcp.ngrok.io)
repository_path_on_the_target_local_mode: Repository path on the target (local mode)
run_an_autonomous_coding_agent_on_a_repo: Run an autonomous coding agent on a repo
runs_in_an_isolated_sandbox_clones_your_: Runs in an isolated sandbox, clones your repo, and opens a PR
sim_tools_exposed_to_the_agent_local_mod: Sim tools exposed to the agent (local mode)
the_branch_the_pull_request_is_opened_ag: The branch the pull request is opened against; the repo is cloned from it too.
the_machine_must_be_reachable_on_a_publi: The machine must be reachable on a public hostname — localhost/LAN addresses are blocked. Use a raw TCP tunnel such as `ngrok tcp 22`.
the_pi_coding_agent_runs_the_pi_harness: The Pi Coding Agent runs the Pi harness against a real repository. In Cloud mode it spins up an isolated sandbox, clones a connected GitHub repo, edits and tests with native shell + git, and opens a pull request. In Local mode it edits files on your own machine over SSH. Both modes stream progress and reuse your models, skills, and multi-turn memory.
url_of_the_opened_pull_request: URL of the opened pull request
